REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND UCL VIOLATION IS OVERRULED. ALL ELEMENTS OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO (1) CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A CONTRACT STARTING WITH FORMATION (OFFER, ACCEPTANCE, CONSIDERATION), TERMS, WHETHER IT IS WRITTEN OR ORAL, ETC. IF CONTRACT IS WRITTEN IT SHALL BE ATTACHED AND THE BREACH PROVISION IDENTIFIED; IF ALLEGED CONTRACT IS ORAL TO ADDRESS STATUTE OF FRAUDS; (2) PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A CLEAR PROMISE AND FACTS TO SUPPORT PLAINTIFF'S CHANGE IN POSITION IN RELIANCE ON THAT PROMISE; (3) CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY; (4) CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FALSE REPORTING FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A REPORTING THAT WAS FALSE, SPECIFICALLY TO ALLEGE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS NOT IN DEFAULT/CURRENT ON HER LOAN AT THE TIME SUCH A REPORT WAS MADE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO (1) CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ACCOUNTING - PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ALLEGE THAT "SOME BALANCE IS DUE THE PLAINTIFF" TESELLE V. MCLOUGHLIN (2009) 173 CAL.APP.4TH 156 OR CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT ACCOUNTING CAUSE OF ACTION MAY BE ASSERTED BY A BORROWER AGAINST A LENDER. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ASSERT ANY FACTS THAT MAY BE ALLEGED IF LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED; (2) CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CC 2923.6. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ADDRESS DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENTS REGARDING CC 2923.6(G) OR CC 2923.6 BEING REPEALED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES HAINES, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joy Johnson, esq. (323-903-7073) for Plaintiff/opposing party Linda Cooks via CourtCall.
No other appearances.

Ms. Johnson sought clarification re: 30 days to amend complaint. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part.
Demurrer to causes of action for negligence and UCL violation is OVERRULED. All elements of these causes of action are sufficiently alleged.
Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to (1) causes of action for breach of contract and breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing for Plaintiff to allege a contract starting with formation (offer, acceptance, consideration), terms, whether it is written or oral, etc. If contract is written it shall be attached and the breach provision identified; if alleged contract is oral to address statute of frauds; (2) promissory estoppel for plaintiff to allege a clear promise and facts to support Plaintiff's change in position in reliance on that promise; (3) cause of action for negligent misrepresentation for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) in support of each element of this cause of action with requisite specificity; (4) cause of action for false reporting for Plaintiff to allege a reporting that was false, specifically to allege that Plaintiff was not in default/current on her loan at the time such a report was made.
Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to (1) cause of action for accounting - Plaintiff failed to allege that "some balance is due the plaintiff" Teselle v. McLoughlin (2009) 173 Cal.App.4th 156 or cite any authority for the proposition that accounting cause of action may be asserted by a borrower against a lender. Plaintiff failed to assert any facts that may be alleged if leave to amend is granted; (2) cause of action for violation of CC 2923.6. Plaintiff failed to address Defendant's arguments regarding CC 2923.6(g) or CC 2923.6 being repealed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
